evals.prompt: Create a custom content entity type called KnowledgeResource for a Drupal 10 site. The entity is for organizing external learning resources (articles, papers, tools, documentation). It should have base fields for: related_topic (entity_reference to node), author (entity_reference to user), resource_type (list_string with allowed values: article, research_paper, tool, documentation), and created timestamp. Include all necessary handlers -- forms, list builder, access handler, and route provider. Put it in a module called knowledge_resource. We want D11 compatibility.
evals.expected_output: A complete content entity type with entity class, base fields, all handlers, and module scaffold
expectations: Entity class baseFieldDefinitions() calls parent::baseFieldDefinitions($entity_type) and assigns/merges the result into $fields (MUST call parent or id/uuid/langcode base fields are lost, causing entity creation to silently fail with missing primary key)
Base fields that should appear in forms use setDisplayOptions('form', [...]) with widget type (without this call, fields are invisible in entity add/edit forms even though they exist in the database)
Base fields that should appear in entity view use setDisplayOptions('view', [...]) with formatter type (without this, entity view mode renders nothing for these fields)

Entity annotation/attribute includes route_provider handler pointing to AdminHtmlRouteProvider or DefaultHtmlRouteProvider (auto-generates CRUD routes from links array instead of hand-writing each entity route in .routing.yml)
This is a content entity per the prompt -- does NOT include config_export key in the annotation/attribute (config_export is for ConfigEntityType only, including it on a content entity causes errors)
The module enables successfully: ddev drush en knowledge_resource returns exit code 0
browser_checks: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to the KnowledgeResource entity add form (e.g., /admin/content/knowledge-resource/add or the path defined in entity links) — verify the form renders with fields for related_topic, author, resource_type (dropdown with article/research_paper/tool/documentation options), and created
Navigate to the KnowledgeResource entity list page (e.g., /admin/content/knowledge-resource) — verify the list builder page loads without errors
